blocks.text: Title Race, Norwegian Heroes, and a CS2 Major — Saturday Delivers

A loaded Saturday with Arsenal leading Man City by 6 points — and the two sides meet Sunday. Tonight, Hovland sits T3 at RBC Heritage and rain hunts CS2 Major glory in Rio. Norwegian angles everywhere.
⛳ Hovland in contention at RBC Heritage — T3 at -7, chasing Åberg's lead at Hilton Head
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 CS2 Major continues — rain (Håvard Nygaard) chasing Norway's biggest CS2 title
🎾 Casper Ruud continues Barcelona Open campaign — clay season form in the spotlight
